ops.title: getaway v2: rewrite orchestration layer (plan-trip.js, SKILL.md, onboard/refresh, hooks)
ops.description: Slug-first plan-trip.js ({project, slug} args, cited JSON.parse shim, 10 phases with per-phase/per-collector checkpoint resume, no jq strings); SKILL.md to ~200 lines + references/{planning,doctrine}.md; onboard/refresh on registry commands + Gmail-assisted credit mining; hooks shell out to `getaway prefs status` / new REFLECT homes.

ops.text: node --test tests/workflow/ green incl. fresh-skip, per-collector resume, hybrid-absent, injection-allowlist cases
slop-cop check passes on every rewritten .md
gather.md domain tables and SKILL.md region/jq-recipe sections deleted (registry/CLI replace them)
